---
title: "Hello"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r data, include=FALSE}
top <- read_csv("billboard.csv") |>
  select(date = "Date",
         song = "Song",
         artist = "Artist")
```

```{r}
modern <- top |>
  filter(date >= "1980-01-01")
```

```{r}
artists <- modern |>
  count(artist) |>
  arrange(-n) |>
  filter(! artist %in% c("Soundtrack", "Various Artists"))
```

```{r}
set.seed(48)
xs <- sample(1:100, 25)
xs
```

```{r}
me <- median(xs)
```

The median is `r me`

# Artists list

```{r}
artists[xs,] |>
  arrange(-n) |>
  gt::gt()
```

# Best in 2000

```{r}
top_in_2000 <- modern |>
  filter(date >= "2000-01-01") |>
  filter(date < "2001-01-01")
```

```{r}
top_in_2000 |>
  count(artist) |>
  arrange(-n)
```

```{r}
top_in_2000 |>
  filter(artist == "Soundtrack") |>
  count(song) |>
  arrange(-n)
```
